visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The scene opens with a close-up of a blue graphic wall featuring a large cartoon character with yellow eyes. A blue mascot, matching the character design, stands in the background of a large exhibition hall. The lighting is bright and industrial, characteristic of a convention center. (2) The camera pans to follow the blue mascot as it walks towards the entrance of a booth. The mascot has an angry, rebellious facial expression with narrowed yellow eyes. Staff members and visitors are visible in the background, along with booth structures and metal railings. (3) Inside the booth, the camera showcases shelves filled with boxed merchandise. The mascot peeks out from behind a partition, its oversized head nearly filling the frame. A person in a tan shirt is briefly seen on the left side of the frame holding a bag. (4) The camera focuses on merchandise baskets containing various plush dolls. A hand enters the frame holding a small blue plush toy, comparing it to the large mascot. The background displays framed illustrations of different 'fairy' characters on a pink wall. (5) The host displays a rack of gray and beige T-shirts. The mascot stands nearby, and the host humorously places a beige T-shirt over the mascot's head, covering its eyes. The mascot's rounded body and small wings are prominent. (6) The scene shifts to a sticker and card display area. The mascot holds a small, flat merchandise item between its paws. The camera captures close-up shots of these items, showing intricate character designs and colorful packaging. (7) The mascot is positioned next to a red and white gashapon machine. It reaches out with its large blue paws to turn the mechanical knob. The camera captures the physical interaction with the machine and the subsequent retrieval of a purple plastic capsule. (8) The host opens the capsule to reveal a collection of character pins. The mascot begins to shake its body vigorously in a comical display of frustration or anger. The video ends with the mascot standing in the booth area while promotional text overlays the screen.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 叛逆仙子帶你逛阿啾的攤位. (2) [Subtitle]: 叛逆叛逆叛逆叛逆叛逆叛逆叛逆. (3) [Subtitle]: 好 跌倒. [Variety]: ?. (4) [Subtitle]: 一進來就可以看到滿滿的叛逆仙子娃娃. (5) [Subtitle]: 哈囉你在門口呀. (6) [Subtitle]: 這裡就可以看到叛逆仙子的屁屁嘍. (7) [Subtitle]: 啊 叛逆仙子有點肥 他要螃蟹走 走進來才行. (8) [Subtitle]: 再來這還是我們的仙子娃娃區. (9) [Subtitle]: hello你有看到你自己嗎 給你看 這個是小時候的叛逆仙子 這個是30歲的叛逆仙子. (10) [Subtitle]: 你喜歡什麼顏色 叛逆仙子 你喜歡這個顏色嗎. (11) [Subtitle]: 太棒了 但因為他那個身材太大隻了 所以我沒有設他的尺寸 所以他只能放在頭上嘍. (12) [Subtitle]: 再來這裡就是貼紙區跟小卡區 來叛逆仙子 你拿你自己的那個. (13) [Variety]: (謎之聲). [Subtitle]: 誰放屁 你是不是放屁. (14) [Subtitle]: 就是這樣 喵 叛逆叛逆 喵. (15) [Subtitle]: 好的 叛逆仙子想要扭蛋 我們來看看仙子先生的手氣 可以扭到什麼東西吧. (16) [Variety]: ??. (17) [Subtitle]: 我幫你看看是什麼東西. (18) [Subtitle]: 哇 你獲得了 OK應該是天真仙子吧. (19) [Subtitle]: 太棒了 你竟然沒抽到你自己 笑死. (20) [Subtitle]: 哎 你怎麼生氣了 他生氣 因為他抽到這個天真仙子啦 大生氣 要不要抽一個 他不要了 你要是不是 那你給我錢啊. (21) [Subtitle]: 八月七號到八月十一號一定耍來 文博會找叛逆仙子玩哦

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 mascot (person in costume), 1 host (visible hand/voice), and at least 3 other staff/visitors in the background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A blue mascot representing 'Rebellious Fairy' with yellow eyes and a constant scowl. The host is a male wearing a tan/greenish shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A large exhibition hall converted into a branded booth with pink and blue graphic walls, merchandise shelves, T-shirt racks, and a gashapon machine.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a fast-paced, high-energy male greeting over a bright, electronic pop BGM. The tempo is upbeat, around 128 BPM, with a strong synthesized drum beat. The vocal is clear and expressive, setting a playful tone. (2) A sharp 'Ding' SFX occurs as a visual question mark appears, followed by a series of 'Whoosh' sounds accompanying fast visual transitions between booth shots. The host's voice remains energetic and rapid. (3) The host's tone shifts to a humorous, slightly teasing delivery while discussing the mascot's size. Ambient convention noise is minimal but present as a low hum. (4) Distinct mechanical clicking and turning sounds are heard as the mascot interacts with the gashapon machine. This is followed by a 'Pop' SFX as a capsule is opened. (5) The final phase features loud, high-arousal laughter and fast speech from the host, reacting to the mascot's comical anger. The BGM maintains its high tempo until the video concludes with a finalized slogan delivery.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Booth Tour -> Interactive Activity -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote a specific artist's ('阿啾') merchandise booth at an exhibition by showcasing the mascot character, product range, and interactive gashapon activity in a humorous and energetic manner.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The entire video focuses on promoting a specific merchandise booth, including shots of branded products and event dates.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a high-energy vlog format typical of short-form social media content to drive foot traffic to a live event booth.
